n: Chapter 15.6: City of Gates, City of Keys

steps.t: Ulishár suggested that you climb the stairs to the west and <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> at the commons of the city, so you might learn the lay…
North of the commons lies the scholar's district of the city. Ulishár recommended that you go there and <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> at the var…
Glorfindel is by the stage in north-western Zajâna.
Glorfindel told you that Inkanûsh went to inspect Khab Kitâx, the Nethergate south of Zajâna.
Inkanûsh is at Khab Kitâx, the Nethergate south of Zajâna.
Ulishár is at Khab Kitâx, the Nethergate, and is very interested in something you have said.
